data.content:
### Fixing Day Radius with Week Numbers (TypeScript/CSS)

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/calendar.mdx

Addresses an issue where the selected day's left border radius was not applied correctly when week numbers are displayed. This code snippet shows how to update the `day` classNames in `components/ui/calendar.tsx` to ensure the correct radius is applied to the first day when `showWeekNumber` is enabled.

```tsx
classNames={{
  // ... other classNames
  day: cn(
    "relative w-full h-full p-0 text-center [&:last-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-r-md group/day aspect-square select-none",
    props.showWeekNumber
      ? "[&:nth-child(2)[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-l-md"
      : "[&:first-child[data-selected=true]_button]:rounded-l-md",
    defaultClassNames.day
  ),
  // ... other classNames
}}
```

--------------------------------

### Add Complex CSS Utility with Nested Selectors to shadcn/ui (JSON)

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/registry/examples.mdx

This JSON configuration adds a complex custom CSS utility that includes nested selectors, using the `@utility` directive within a shadcn/ui component registry item. It defines a `scrollbar-hidden` utility that targets specific pseudo-elements (like `&::-webkit-scrollbar`) to hide scrollbars. This demonstrates creating utilities for more intricate styling requirements.

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
  "name": "custom-component",
  "type": "registry:component",
  "css": {
    "@utility scrollbar-hidden": {
      "scrollbar-hidden": {
        "&::-webkit-scrollbar": {
          "display": "none"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Render Rounded Icon Button

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/button.mdx

Shows how to create a fully rounded icon button by applying the Tailwind CSS `rounded-full` class to an icon button variant.

```tsx
<Button variant="outline" size="icon" className="rounded-full">
  <ArrowUpRightIcon />
</Button>
```

--------------------------------

### Render Basic Button with Outline and Icon

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/button.mdx

Demonstrates how to render a basic button with an outline variant and an icon-only button using `ArrowUpIcon` for submission.

```tsx
<Button variant="outline">Button</Button>
<Button variant="outline" size="icon" aria-label="Submit">
  <ArrowUpIcon />
</Button>
```

--------------------------------

### Define Array Field Validation with Zod

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/forms/tanstack-form.mdx

This code demonstrates how to define validation rules for array fields using the Zod schema library. It specifies that the `emails` field is an array of objects, where each object must contain an `address` that is a valid email string. Additionally, it applies `.min(1)` and `.max(5)` constraints to ensure the array contains between 1 and 5 email addresses. This schema is crucial for robust client-side validation in forms.

```tsx
const formSchema = z.object({
  emails: z
    .array(
      z.object({
        address: z.string().email("Enter a valid email address."),
      })
    )
    .min(1, "Add at least one email address.")
    .max(5, "You can add up to 5 email addresses."),
})
```

--------------------------------

### Install Checkbox Dependencies via npm

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/checkbox.mdx

Manual installation of the Radix UI checkbox dependency. Required when manually setting up the component instead of using the CLI installation method.

```bash
npm install @radix-ui/react-checkbox
```

--------------------------------

### Conditionally Style shadcn/ui Sidebar based on collapsible state

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/sidebar.mdx

This snippet illustrates how to apply conditional styling to a `SidebarGroup` component within a shadcn/ui `Sidebar`. It uses a Tailwind CSS utility class (`group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden`) to hide the group when the sidebar is in `icon` mode, providing dynamic layout adjustments based on the sidebar's state.

```tsx
<Sidebar collapsible="icon">
  <SidebarContent>
    <SidebarGroup className="group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden" />
  </SidebarContent>
</Sidebar>
```

--------------------------------

### Render FieldLegend with Label Variant in TSX

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/field.mdx

The `FieldLegend` component provides a legend for a `FieldSet`. It can be rendered with a `label` variant to match label sizing and alignment, which is useful for nested `FieldSet` elements. This helps maintain consistent styling and hierarchy within forms.

```tsx
<FieldLegend variant="label">Notification Preferences</FieldLegend>
```

--------------------------------

### Add TypeScript `cn` Helper for Merging Tailwind CSS Classes

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/installation/manual.mdx

This TypeScript utility function, `cn`, combines `clsx` and `tailwind-merge` to efficiently merge multiple class values into a single, optimized string. Intended for `lib/utils.ts`, it simplifies conditional styling and avoids class conflicts when working with Tailwind CSS, providing a robust way to manage dynamic class names in components. It depends on the `clsx` and `tailwind-merge` packages.

```typescript
import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
}
```

--------------------------------

### Implement Rate Limiting for Registry Endpoints with Express

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/registry/authentication.mdx

This TypeScript code demonstrates how to implement rate limiting for a registry endpoint using the `express-rate-limit` middleware. It configures a limiter to restrict each IP address to a maximum of 100 requests within a 15-minute window, protecting the registry from abuse and denial-of-service attacks.

```typescript
import rateLimit from "express-rate-limit"

const limiter = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes
  max: 100, // limit each IP to 100 requests per windowMs
})

app.use("/registry", limiter)
```

--------------------------------

### Define Custom Component Styles for shadcn/ui (JSON)

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/registry/examples.mdx

This JSON configuration defines component-specific styles using the `@layer components` directive within a shadcn/ui component registry item. It allows for styling specific UI components like a 'card' with custom background, border-radius, padding, and shadow properties. This approach helps in organizing and applying styles directly to components.

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
  "name": "custom-card",
  "type": "registry:component",
  "css": {
    "@layer components": {
      "card": {
        "background-color": "var(--color-white)",
        "border-radius": "var(--rounded-lg)",
        "padding": "var(--spacing-6)",
        "box-shadow": "var(--shadow-xl)"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Add CartesianGrid to Recharts Bar Chart (TypeScript/TSX)

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/chart.mdx

This snippet integrates the `CartesianGrid` component into the `BarChart` within a `ChartContainer`. Setting `vertical={false}` ensures only horizontal grid lines are displayed, enhancing readability without clutter.

```tsx
<ChartContainer config={chartConfig} className="min-h-[200px] w-full">
  <BarChart accessibilityLayer data={chartData}>
    <CartesianGrid vertical={false} />
    <Bar dataKey="desktop" fill="var(--color-desktop)" radius={4} />
    <Bar dataKey="mobile" fill="var(--color-mobile)" radius={4} />
  </BarChart>
</ChartContainer>
```

--------------------------------

### Render Sidebar Separator in shadcn/ui

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/sidebar.mdx

Demonstrates how to integrate the `SidebarSeparator` component within a `Sidebar` to visually divide content. It shows typical placement within `Sidebar` and `SidebarContent` for structuring navigation elements.

```tsx
<Sidebar>
  <SidebarHeader />
  <SidebarSeparator />
  <SidebarContent>
    <SidebarGroup />
    <SidebarSeparator />
    <SidebarGroup />
  </SidebarContent>
</Sidebar>
```

--------------------------------

### Add Functional CSS Utilities with Wildcards to shadcn/ui (JSON)

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/registry/examples.mdx

This JSON configuration adds functional CSS utilities using the `@utility` directive with a wildcard (`*`) within a shadcn/ui component registry item. It allows for defining a series of utility classes, like `tab-*`, that dynamically map to CSS variables (`var(--tab-size-*)`) based on the wildcard value. This pattern is useful for creating scalable and configurable utility systems.

```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json",
  "name": "custom-component",
  "type": "registry:component",
  "css": {
    "@utility tab-*": {
      "tab-size": "var(--tab-size-*)"
    }
  }
}
```

--------------------------------

### Use FieldSeparator for Visual Section Division in TSX

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/field.mdx

The `FieldSeparator` component acts as a visual divider to separate distinct sections within a `FieldGroup`. It can optionally include inline content, making it useful for breaking up long forms into manageable parts and improving readability.

```tsx
<FieldSeparator>Or continue with</FieldSeparator>
```

--------------------------------

### Install Radix UI Slider dependency manually

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/slider.mdx

This command installs the `@radix-ui/react-slider` package, which is a foundational dependency for the Shadcn UI Slider component. This step is part of the manual installation process, preceding the copying of the component's source code.

```bash
npm install @radix-ui/react-slider
```

--------------------------------

### Render Outline Button Variant

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/button.mdx

Shows how to render a button with the `outline` variant, providing a clear border and transparent background.

```tsx
<Button variant="outline">Outline</Button>
```

--------------------------------

### Field Component with Validation and Error State

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/field.mdx

Shows how to visually indicate an error state for a Field component. This is achieved by adding the `data-invalid` attribute to the Field wrapper and `aria-invalid` to the input element. The `FieldError` component displays the validation message.

```tsx
<Field data-invalid>
  <FieldLabel htmlFor="email">Email</FieldLabel>
  <Input id="email" type="email" aria-invalid />
  <FieldError>Enter a valid email address.</FieldError>
</Field>
```

--------------------------------

### Install Radix UI Select Dependencies Manually

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/select.mdx

This command manually installs the core @radix-ui/react-select package, which is a foundational dependency for the Shadcn UI Select component. This step is part of the manual installation process, preceding the copying of component code.

```bash
npm install @radix-ui/react-select
```
